comments.body: Launching via `bash -lc` + backgrounding is fragile and bypasses crit's own session coordination semantics. Consider adding a dedicated non-blocking command/tool path in the extension runtime (or a process manager hook) so we can avoid shell-escaping + pid parsing complexity here.
comments.author: Pi (gpt-5.3-codex)

comments.body: In `mode=files`, implicit fallback to the active files session can be surprising after context switches. Consider printing the resolved file list in the success message so scope is explicit before review starts.
comments.author: Pi (gpt-5.3-codex)

comments.body: Session tracking is in-memory only. After Pi restart, ownership metadata is lost so cleanup cannot target earlier sessions from this Pi session. If acceptable, document this; otherwise persist minimal session metadata.
comments.author: Pi (gpt-5.3-codex)
